name: CB Financial Services, Inc.
summary: CB Financial Services, Inc. CB Financial Services, Inc. (the Company), a Pennsylvania corporation, is a bank holding company headquartered in Carmichaels, Pennsylvania. The Companys common stock is traded on the Nasdaq Global Market under the symbol CBFV. The Company conducts its operations primarily through its wholly owned subsidiary, Community Bank, a Pennsylvania-chartered commercial bank.
